haiku.text: I build the PR description in a temp file, then pass it inline: `pr create --title "..." --body "$(cat /tmp/pr-body.md)"`. The body is read from disk at call time and handed to the binary through the supported flag.

sonnet.text: I build the PR description in a temp file, then pass it inline: `pr create --title "..." --body "$(cat /tmp/pr-body.md)"`. The body is read from disk at call time and handed to the binary through the supported flag.
